metadata.title: Metacube
metadata.description: Explore the Metacube Marketplace on Starknet. Buy exclusive Metacube NFTs, win unique rewards, and trade your assets in this blockchain-powered gaming ecosystem.
metadata.keywords: metacube marketplace, nft marketplace, buy nft, win nft, trade nft, starknet, blockchain gaming

market.title: Market
market.description: Explore and trade unique gaming NFTs on the Metacube Marketplace. Discover exclusive digital assets powered by Starknet blockchain technology for an enhanced gaming experience.
market.keywords: metacube marketplace, buy nft, trade nft, gaming nft, starknet marketplace, blockchain gaming, digital assets

inventory.title: Inventory
inventory.description: Manage and view your Metacube NFT collection. Track your gaming assets and digital collectibles in one secure place, powered by Starknet blockchain technology.
inventory.keywords: metacube inventory, nft collection, gaming assets, digital collectibles, starknet wallet, blockchain gaming, nft management

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.description: Earn and claim exclusive NFT rewards in the Metacube gaming ecosystem. Discover unique digital assets and achievements powered by Starknet blockchain technology.
rewards.keywords: metacube rewards, nft rewards, gaming rewards, blockchain rewards, starknet nft, metacube gaming, free nft claims

allstars.title: All Stars
allstars.description: Browse through the original Allstars V1 collection featuring 10'000 unique NFTs with detailed 3D models and visuals.
allstars.keywords: Allstars, NFT collection, digital art, 3D NFTs, blockchain collectibles
allstars.twitterTitle: Metacube Marketplace - Buy, Win & Trade NFTs
allstars.twitterDescription: Explore the Metacube Marketplace on Starknet. Buy exclusive Metacube NFTs, win unique rewards, and trade your assets.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An unexpected error occurred while loading the marketplace.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist on the Metacube marketplace.

allstars.title: All Stars
allstars.noResults: No Allstars found matching "{searchTerm}". Try a different search term.
allstars.noNFTs: No NFTs available. Please try again later.

nft.emptyStateListed: No NFTs are currently listed for sale
nft.emptyStateWithFilter: No NFTs available with the selected filter

claim.invalidTokenId: NFT ID {ids} is invalid or not yet minted
claim.transactionFailed: Transaction Failed: Please try again later

marketplace.missingNftDetails: Missing NFT details or wallet not connected

messages.noNftsAvailable: No NFTs available in this collection

contract.accountNotConnected: Account not connected. Please connect your wallet first.
contract.insufficientBalance: Insufficient STRK balance to complete purchase.
contract.listingStatusCheckFailed: Failed to check if NFT is listed
contract.listNftFailed: Failed to list NFT for sale: {error}
